message:
fix(engine): use to_string() for scoped_operations hash input and
update ts_shipped_path_evidence module attributes

threshold_signing: use op.to_string().as_bytes() instead of
op.as_bytes() for scoped_operations hash input to ensure proper
string conversion regardless of the operation type.

ts_shipped_path_evidence: update module-level attributes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
